message:
test(linalg): add NumPy oracle parity tests for det, inv, solve, norm, eig, svd, cholesky, qr

Add 15 NumPy-verified oracle tests checking numerical agreement within
1e-12 tolerance for: det (2x2, 3x3), inv (2x2, 3x3), solve (2x2, 3x3),
matrix_norm (frobenius), eig (2x2 eigenvalues), svd (2x2 singular
values), cholesky (3x3 lower triangle), qr (2x2 Q orthogonality and
R upper-triangular), and lstsq (3x2 residual). All expected values
generated from NumPy 2.x with precision=17.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
